idea-plugin.name: Qualimetry C# Analyzer
idea-plugin.description:
Rider plugin for the Qualimetry C# rule set. Once set up, Qualimetry findings appear in the editor in real time as you type, run by Rider's bundled Roslyn host. It does two things:
  • When you open a solution that does not yet reference the analyzer, it offers to add the Qualimetry.CSharp.Analyzer NuGet package, so Rider's bundled Roslyn host runs the analyzer. You can also add it manually to a selected C# project.
  • Syncs the active rule set from a SonarQube quality profile into a local .globalconfig at the solution root, mapping each active rule and severity to a dotnet_diagnostic.<rule>.severity entry.
Analysis is performed by the Roslyn analyzer once the NuGet is referenced. This plugin provisions and configures it for you.

action.text: Qualimetry: Sync Rules From SonarQube Profile
action.description: Writes a .globalconfig at the solution root from the active SonarQube quality profile.

action.text: Qualimetry: Add C# Analyzer To Project
action.description: Adds the Qualimetry.CSharp.Analyzer PackageReference to the selected .csproj.
